Monthly Summary · Tokens & Currencies vs USD

Monthly Exchange Rates Dashboard

Monthly token prices from your CoinGecko exports, alongside x-rates.com currency averages. Data is saved in your browser between sessions.

Auto-update from CoinGecko
Coin ID = the part of your CoinGecko CSV filename before -usd-max (e.g. sut-usd-max.csv → sut). Fix any that are wrong:
Get a free key at coingecko.com → Developers → Demo API. Refresh pulls CoinGecko's daily history (the same figures as their website), so you can stop importing CSVs. For very thinly-traded tokens the newest day or two may still settle after a day.
Monthly Average Price by Token
Average of each month's daily close prices (USD), one row per token, one column per month. Red marks a decline from the previous month.
Monthly Average FX Rate by Currency
x-rates.com — US Dollars per 1 unit of each currency. History through May-2026 matches your existing sheet; from Jun-2026 on, each month shows the previous month's average ("last month's avg" basis). Red marks a month-over-month decline.
Paste monthly data from x-rates.com
Open an x-rates monthly-average page (e.g. x-rates.com/average/?from=AUD&to=USD&year=2025), highlight the month list, and paste it below. Lines look like Jan 0.676823 – 31 days. If you include the page heading, the currency is auto-detected; otherwise pick it. History through May-2026 is locked to your sheet — only add new months. With last month's avg ticked, each pasted month is placed in the following column (your chosen basis).
You can also paste a fiat-matrix CSV exported earlier from this dashboard to restore everything at once.
Daily Data Table
Raw daily records for the selected tokens and date range. Newest first — export for the complete set.
